Planning CC Products

[Slide 5]
Circular Plan (Retpack) One Pager
Global consolidation is manual, Excel-based, and fragmented, making it time-consuming, error-prone, and dependent on individuals. The bottom-up BGT lacks a data-driven approach, with no platform for Retpack material forecasting and limited scenario management, leading to inefficiencies and poor pushback to zones—addressable through o9-enabled automated planning.
Objective
Circular Plan (Retpack)
Digital Platforms
CAPEX spend optimization
Business KPIs
Develop a fully automatized, centralized platform:

[Slide 12]
E2E Material Planning Dashboard
The Material Requirement Plans generated in O9 are 99.9% touchless
Despite this, the deviation between O9 plan and OnTime Suggestion (Plan vs Execution) is > 45%
For US, We compared
Inventory Policy – DIP implemented
Input Demand – Matched and fixed
Stock on Hand & Existing Orders  -WIP
To evaluate what is driving this deviation.
Streamlining and harmonizing execution inputs across O9 and OnTime is critical to closing the Plan‑to‑Execute gap, improving MRP outcomes, and strengthening supplier collaboration.
The dashboard aims to streamline the E2E Material planning &  move towards 100% touchless
O9 generates a 26-week forecast using demand, orders and inventory data every week
OnTime generates suggestions for PO execution using same inputs as O9.
Both systems use same inputs from same sources.

Key Insights/Recommendations: Every 10% increase in this KPI drives a 2.5% increase in overall touchless rate
For example, improving Brazil: KPI 47% → 67% → Touchless 66% → 71%
Zone is working on suggestions improvement and Auto Macro to improve STR Suggestion targeting 65% this year
